title: Eurybia × herveyi
taxonomy: Eurybia × herveyi is a marine alga belonging to the class Florideophyceae. Within the class Florideophyceae, it is further classified as a member of the order Gigartinales. The order Gigartinales is a group of red algae, characterized by their simple and complex thallus structures. Eurybia × herveyi's classification is also supported by its possession of characteristic features such as the presence of tetrasporangia and the absence of spermatangia. Further, its classification is also based on the presence of the pigment chlorophyll-a and the lack of a cuticle.
